summary: Iteration 2 backend testing: validated sparkline arrays in /api/quotes, prediction caching with 1h TTL + force bypass, new /api/compare endpoint, plus regression on all previous endpoints. 15/15 pytest tests passed in 23.82s.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 458 lines - still within healthy range but approaching threshold; consider splitting LLM prediction logic into its own module as features grow.

Prediction cache key relies on generated_at >= cutoff iso-string comparison. ISO 8601 strings sort lexicographically only when timezone-normalized; current code always uses UTC isoformat so this works, but a typed datetime field in Mongo would be safer.
/api/compare swallows per-ticker errors silently (returns only valid series). Good for partial-invalid test, but consider returning a 'skipped' list so the UI can surface invalid tickers to the user.
predict endpoint: parsed['direction'] may come back unexpected values (e.g., 'bullish'); current str().lower() does not validate against {up,down,flat}. Pydantic Enum would be safer.
_pkey field added to predictions doc but no unique index — concurrent forced predictions could create duplicate documents. Consider TTL index on generated_at to auto-expire stale cache rows.
seed_data_creation: INTC prediction cached during test_predict_cache_flow_intc (forced fresh, then cached). Watchlist remains at 12 default tickers (verified post-test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 2 acceptance criteria pass: sparkline >=10 floats per quote; force=true bypasses cache (cached=False); subsequent call within 1h returns cached=True with same prediction_price in <5s; /api/compare validates min 2 / max 4 tickers (400) and silently drops invalid tickers (200 with only valid series). No _id leakage detected anywhere. Predictions collection now has INTC + NVDA cached entries.
